commit 5b7e3cf5dde465ed565391bb6e06402b05f770a2

    audio/rsgain: Add UNICODE option

    Add UNICODE option to enable output of unicode characters (on by
    default, retaining previous behavior).

    Limit progress bar to 80 columns for improved readability.

    PR:             267567
    Reported by:    diizzy
